purpose: Saudi man applying grooming product in front of bathroom mirror. Casual home framing, real skin texture.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Authentic at-home morning routine photograph of a Saudi man in his early thirties applying {product_type} to his beard or face in front of softly lit bathroom mirror, well-groomed short to medium beard, casual home shirt or simple undershirt, focus on hands carefully applying product, real visible skin texture with natural pores beard hairs and slight imperfections, candid expression of focused concentration, warm interior bathroom lighting, slightly out-of-focus surroundings, shot as if from phone propped on counter at chest height, authentic morning routine non-staged composition, natural body type {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: smooth plastic skin
Avoid in output: model perfect features
Avoid in output: fashion magazine pose
Never present non-Saudi talent or generic Middle-Eastern look — Saudi specificity is the point
Avoid tourist-photography aesthetic; this is lived-in lifestyle, not destination shoot
notes: Intents: grow, harvest. Source code in research corpus: S06. Saudi adaptation guidance: Saudi men's grooming market exploded since 2022. Reflects modern urban Saudi male aesthetic — well-groomed beard rather than full traditional or clean-shaven, casual home wear rather than thobe (private grooming). Reference image: Recommended. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per week for men's grooming.
